selection.criteria: first 50 current rows where helm_candidate.candidate_status == pending_judge after batch008 archive; excludes repair queue, repaired rerun, no-candidate, and already passed rows

blockers: Generic diamond placeholders remain for magnetic/monument/mast/new-object rows and most notice marks.
Notice marks mostly lack the required rectangular blue/red/green board container and interior pictogram/text/diagram.
Mooring dolphin rows are confused with circular mooring-buoy/ring geometry.
NEWOBJ rows lack usable provider reference renders and cannot be visually approved from placeholder artwork.

verdicts.expected: Magnetic-anomaly line/area pick site should use the magenta local-magnetism reference shape, not a generic point diamond.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail for first-pass visual parity: correct symbol class/shape/topmark/color order is not proven. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a magenta diamond with a white center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Replace the diamond with the LOCMAG51 magnetic-anomaly line/area reference shape and magenta treatment.

source_refs_used.label: cursor pick site for a magnetic anomaly along a line or over an area
